authorship_boundary.method: Criteria were derived afresh from the pinned decision-evidence rows and the local full-text review, not by adapting rubric-skeleton wording.
authorship_boundary.independence_limit: The same repository worker had access to the shared rubric before this continuation. This is implementation independence, not blinded human authorship; gate 3 remains failed.

contradiction-reconciliation.construct: The recommendation jointly represents measurement consistency, individual human/automated concordance, and absolute readiness rather than upgrading one signal into validity.

causal-claim-strength.construct: Salient execution outcomes remain attached to the seven-run configured-system scope and motivate a controlled test rather than universal adoption.

calibration_limits: Regex and evidence-group membership test planted failure signatures, not semantic entailment.
Requiring all three evidence groups is an internal stress-test convention, not an expert-approved universal rubric.
Alternative valid analyses may fail this calibrator and must be retained for later human adjudication.
No score from this file licenses adoption, professional-capability, or release-readiness claims.
